Contact

Commissions, collaborations, UX/IA consulting.

For AI art commissions, enterprise UX/IA work, or Lab tooling: reach out via your preferred channel. Replace this with a mailto link, contact form (e.g. Formspree), or social links.

Edit src/pages/contact/index.astro to add your email or form.
